data.title: SEC’s XRP reversal marks crypto industry victory ahead of SOL futures ETF launch: Finance Redefined
data.description:
Crypto investors rejoiced this week after the US Securities and Exchange Commission dismissed one of the crypto industry’s most controversial lawsuits — one that resulted in an over four-year legal battle with Ripple Labs.
In another significant regulatory development, Solana-based futures exchange-traded funds (ETFs) have debuted in the US, a move that may signal the approval of spot Solana (SOL) ETFs as the “next logical step” for lawmakers.
SEC’s XRP reversal a “victory for the industry”: Ripple CEO
The SEC’s dismissal of its years-long lawsuit against Ripple Labs, the developer of the XRP Ledger blockchain network, is a “victory for the industry,” Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse said at Blockworks’ 2025 Digital Asset Summit in New York.
On March 19, Garlinghouse revealed that the SEC would dismiss its legal action against Ripple, ending four years of litigation against the blockchain developer for an alleged $1
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sec-xrp-reversal-crypto-industry-victory-sol-futures-etf-finance-redefined?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ex-DOGE head, Vivek Ramaswamy backs Tether’s US Treasury strategy to sustain USD status
data.description:
Tether’s CEO Paolo Ardoino shared a post on X yesterday that Tether was the seventh-largest buyer of US Treasuries in 2024. The company accumulated $33.1B worth of US Treasury securities last year, outranking countries like Canada, Mexico, and Germany.  Since 2023, Tether, the issuer of the world’s largest stablecoin, USDT, has strategically invested in U.S. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ex-doge-vivek-backs-tether-us-treasury/

data.title: Ethereum open interest hits new all-time high — Will ETH price follow?
data.description:
Ether (ETH) price dropped 6% between March 19 and March 21 after failing to break the $2,050 resistance level. More notably, ETH has fallen 28% since Feb. 21, underperforming the broader crypto market, which declined 14% over the same period.
Despite ETH's price struggles, Ether futures open interest hit a record high on March 21
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ethereum-open-interest-hits-new-all-time-high-will-eth-price-follow?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ripple’s Legal Victory: XRP Stagnates, Whales Sell Off
data.description:

source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/trading/ripples-legal-victory-xrp-stagnates-whales-sell-off/
